productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Brown Check Dress
description: Style Note This brown dress, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous dress. Style this with understated accessories and heeled shoes. Product Details Brown sleeveless dress with a round neck, slightly pleated on the chest with an elasticated waist Material and Care Viscose stretch Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron on reverse; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
